subjects.description: A male pedestrian standing on the right-side curb of the road, facing the ego vehicle, wearing a light gray short-sleeve t-shirt prominently displaying a red octagonal 'STOP' sign graphic across the chest.
subjects.appearance_details: Casual urban attire with dark jeans and sneakers; carries a small backpack on one shoulder; clean-cut appearance.
subjects.relationship: He is the focal pedestrian whose presence prompts the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop.
subjects.location: Right side of frame, mid-ground on the curb
subjects.pose: Standing upright, weight evenly distributed, arms relaxed at sides, looking directly toward the approaching car.
subjects.action: Standing still on the curb, facing the ego vehicle.
subjects.state_changes: Remains largely stationary; turns head slightly to track the approaching vehicle as it slows to a stop.
subjects.clothing: Light gray short-sleeve t-shirt with a red octagonal 'STOP' sign print, dark blue jeans, white sneakers, single-strap backpack.
subjects.expression: Calm, attentive, neutral expression with slightly raised eyebrows.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light-medium skin tone with a smooth, even complexion.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark brown hair, brown eyes, clean-shaven jawline, straight nose, neutral lips.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself is implied through the dashcam/driver perspective; visible elements include the lower edge of the vehicle's hood — a dark gray metallic car hood subtly visible at the bottom of the frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Slight reflections on the hood surface, windshield frame edges barely visible at the periphery of the shot
subjects.relationship: The ego vehicle is the viewer's point of reference, approaching the pedestrian
subjects.location: Bottom edge of frame (hood visible), perspective originates from behind the windshield
subjects.relative_size: Large within frame (occupies bottom edge as reference)
subjects.orientation: Facing forward along the road toward the pedestrian
subjects.action: Driving forward along the road at a brisk, elevated speed, then braking sharply and abruptly to a complete stop and remaining stopped
subjects.state_changes: Vehicle transitions from a brisk forward speed to a sharp, abrupt deceleration to a full stop, after which it remains completely stationary and never resumes moving for the rest of the clip.

background_setting: A two-lane coastal road under flat overcast noon light after recent rain, a sea-wall and grey water on one side and low pastel seaside buildings on the other, wet reflective asphalt, a young male pedestrian standing on the right promenade curb facing the ego vehicle.

lighting.direction: Flat diffuse top light from a fully clouded sky
lighting.shadows: Soft shadowless light; wet-road sheen reflecting the pale sky
lighting.illumination_effect: Even low-contrast illumination with wet-road specular sheen and salt haze; the red STOP graphic on the shirt reads clearly against the grey

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego dashcam framing with the wet coastal road vanishing ahead; the pedestrian at the right promenade curb
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool greys of overcast sky, wet asphalt and grey sea, spring pastel walls, accented by the red STOP-shirt graphic
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating salt-worn lane markings reflected on the wet road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam motion at a brisk approach speed that decelerates sharply and abruptly to a complete stop, then holds completely static with no further movement
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the pedestrian on the right curb

context: Autonomous driving / driver-assistance scenario demonstrating deceleration and stopping in response to a stop-sign visual cue.

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the wet coastal road at a brisk, elevated speed, quickly approaching the pedestrian standing on the right promenade curb.

The vehicle brakes sharply and abruptly over a short braking distance on the wet asphalt as it nears the pedestrian whose shirt displays the red STOP graphic, coming to a complete full stop by the end of this segment.
The vehicle remains completely stopped and motionless beside the pedestrian above the wet coastal road for the final two seconds.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White bold uppercase letters centered on a red octagon with a white border, printed on a gray t-shirt
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, visible throughout the clip on the right side of frame
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop-sign graphic on the pedestrian's shirt that serves as the visual cue prompting the vehicle to stop

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives forward in its lane along the wet coastal road at a brisk speed, the stop-sign-shirted pedestrian visible ahead on the right promenade curb.
segments.key_changes: Brisk forward motion; pedestrian grows larger in frame quickly.
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam at brisk speed, maintaining lane center.

segments.description: The vehicle brakes sharply and abruptly on the wet road as it closes the distance to the pedestrian, coming to a complete stop by the end of the segment.
segments.key_changes: Speed drops rapidly to zero within about one second; a hard, abrupt halt.
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion decelerating sharply with a pronounced forward pitch, settling quickly to stationary.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped beside the pedestrian on the wet coastal road and remains completely motionless for the final two seconds.
segments.key_changes: Complete halt held; absolutely no forward motion; the vehicle never starts moving again; pedestrian remains standing facing the vehicle.
segments.camera: Static dashcam, no forward motion whatsoever, vehicle held stationary in lane.

temporal_caption: From 0:00 to 0:02 the dashcam view cruises forward along a wet coastal road under flat overcast noon light after rain at a brisk speed, grey sea beyond the sea-wall while a young male pedestrian in a t-shirt bearing a red STOP graphic stands on the right promenade curb facing the car. From 0:02 to 0:03 the vehicle brakes sharply and abruptly on the wet asphalt as it approaches him, coming to a complete stop by 0:03. From 0:03 to 0:05 it sits fully stationary beside the pedestrian above the wet coastal road, remaining completely motionless.
audio_description: Coastal overcast soundscape with wet tire roll, a soft sea breeze and distant surf that drop abruptly from 0:02 with a brief sharp brake squeal. Faint gull cries settle into a quiet idle at the full stop by 0:03 and stay through the end. No speech or music.
